Residential
Products
Hydro-Gear residential-grade drive solutions are built with the most demanding residential users in mind. High-quality dependable components, designed for optimum performance, for the guy who’s not going to stop until his lawn stops traffic.
Go to Residential
Commercial
Products
We build our commercial-grade products for optimal performance in the most strenuous applications. Day after day, Hydro-Gear products provide the power to get the job done because professionals don’t have time to worry about their equipment working - and neither do you.
Go to Commercial
Electric
Products
Smartec products feature the most advanced electric drive systems of their kind. All designed and assembled in Indianapolis – the capital city of speed, innovation, and technologically advanced motors. Look no further for your drive-by-wire or fully electric drive system needs.

Moving You Forward
Hydro-Gear is the driving force inside the most trusted machines on the planet. We’re the world’s leading manufacturer of drivetrain solutions—things like hydrostatic drives and transaxles. Whether it’s a heavy-duty industrial machine or a residential mower, we’re the reason our customers keep moving forward.
Go to About
Hydro-Gear wins Bad Boy Mowers 2024 Supplier of the Year
Hydro-Gear was given a 100% on the Supplier Scorecard at Bad Boy Mowers this year. The announcement was made during the company’s 2024 Supplier Conference held at the Graduate Hotel in New York City on July 21-24.
Hydro-Gear demonstrates new innovations at Equip 2023
As the outdoor power equipment industry celebrated 40 years of expo with the 2023 edition of Equip Exposition, Hydro-Gear showed why it is known as one of the industry’s most innovative suppliers.
The show was a success! Equip Exhibition 2022
The industry buzz continues to be about electrification and that suits us well - because we are ready with turn-key complete electric systems.

about.text:
About - Hydro-Gear
About Us.
Hydro-Gear is the driving force inside the most trusted machines on the planet. We’re the world’s leading manufacturer of drivetrain solutions - things like hydrostatic drives, transaxles, and fully electric drive systems. Whether it’s a heavy-duty industrial machine or a residential mower, we’re the reason our customers keep moving forward.
THE MOST IMPRESSIVE THING WE’VE BUILT OVER THE YEARS?
OUR REPUTATION.
Success is not a destination. It’s a culture. A way of doing business. And an expectation you have for the companies you work with.
We take great pride in our commitment to your ongoing success. Living up to our corporate Vision Statement which promises “Long-term success for our customers, people, suppliers, and Hydro-Gear.”
And that success is achieved through strong and lasting relationships with both our customers and our employees.
FORWARD THINKING.
We are very proud to have become the world leader we are today. But we didn’t get here by resting on past successes.  We are always looking toward the future, which means continuous innovation in our products, processes, and environmental protection.
Be sure to check out our all new
electric drive systems
A BRIEF HISTORY.
For
over
30 years, Hydro-Gear’s goal has been to provide products and services that meet our customers' rigorous requirements and exceed their expectations. The company is headquartered in Sullivan, IL, and operates four manufacturing facilities, with offices around the world.
How’d we get here? Here’s the short version:
Danfoss (Ames, IA) produced a hydraulic
transmission for OEMs.
Agri-Fab (Sullivan, IL) produced an axle assembly for OEMs.
OEMs would pair them together.
1991 - Hydro-Gear was founded as a joint venture to create and manufacture transmission and axle combinations before supplying the OEM.
The rest is history.
Today, Hydro-Gear is a world leader in the design and production of precision drive solutions, serving multiple industries and exporting products worldwide.
Testimonials
Barreto Mfg. Inc. - Greg Barreto, President
"Barreto Manufacturing started using the Hydro-Gear BDP-10 almost 30 years ago when we designed our first all-hydraulic trencher. That Hydro-Gear model is still used on several pieces of our equipment and has been a compliment to the durability that we engineer into our products. We look forward to our continued success with Hydro-Gear products in our current line of equipment as well as in future design applications."
DR Power Equipment - Bill Wooden, Engineering Manager
"Our experience with Hydro-Gear has been nothing but outstanding. The support and response provided during our product development process helped us make decisions quickly and with confidence. The technical expertise of the Hydro-Gear team allowed us to evaluate and optimize our product design to fulfill the functional requirements and the needs of our customers."
ABI Attachments - Nate Smith, Director of Engineering
"As a small OEM, I’ve found Hydro-Gear extremely easy to work with even though our company isn’t buying millions of dollars of product. Always quick to respond and offered very helpful design suggestions as we developed our machine. Quality and delivery were great as well, when we went into production."
Excel Industries Inc. - Spencer Willis, Advanced Development Engineer
"Working with Hydro-Gear is great. Their industry knowledge and engineering team bring reliable drive systems to our industry. Their customer focus and dedication to relationships make working with Hydro-Gear enjoyable."
Stinger Equipment - Brian Moore, President
“I’ve worked with Hydro-Gear for the past 27 years and they’ve always been a wonderful supplier, always worked with us to meet any challenges that have been presented.”
Mean Green Mowers - Joe Conrad, President
“We started using Hydro-Gear several years ago. We needed something innovative, efficient and economical for what we are doing in a very competitive world and the folks at Hydro-
